zh.Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Wake於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯時，她的父親Baldwin Le Wak or Wake20歲，母親Ela Beauchamp27歲。她於大約1285年與Michael Picot結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年4月10日享年46歲。

zh-hans.Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Wake于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布利斯沃斯时，她的父亲Baldwin Le Wak or Wake20岁，母亲Ela Beauchamp27岁。她于大约1285年与Michael Picot结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年4月10日享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Wake was born about 1255, in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Baldwin Le Wak or Wake, was 20 and her mother, Ela Beauchamp, was 27. She married Michael Picot about 1285. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 April 1300, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Wake est née environ 1255, à Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baldwin Le Wak or Wake, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ela Beauchamp, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Michael Picot environ 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1300, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Wake um 1255 in Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baldwin Le Wak or Wake 20 und ihre Mutter Ela Beauchamp 27. Sie hat um 1285 Michael Picot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. April 1300 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wake è nata il circa 1255 nel Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Baldwin Le Wak or Wake, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Ela Beauchamp, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Michael Picot circa 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 aprile 1300, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wake(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 블리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baldwin Le Wak or Wake(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela Beauchamp(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 Michael Picot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 4월 10일 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wake nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Baldwin Le Wak or Wake, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ela Beauchamp, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael Picot aproximadamente 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1300, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Wake родилась около 1255 г. в местности блисворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Baldwin Le Wak or Wake было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Beauchamp, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael Picot около 1285 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 апреля 1300 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Wake nació aproximadamente 1255, en Blisworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baldwin Le Wak or Wake, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ela Beauchamp, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Michael Picot aproximadamente 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de abril de 1300, a la edad de 46 años.
